result:
If I could change the world in one way, I would eliminate poverty and ensure that every human being has access to adequate food, clean water, safe shelter, healthcare, and education. I believe that no one should suffer from lack of basic necessities and that alleviating extreme poverty is one of the greatest challenges facing humanity. 

By ensuring that everyone's fundamental needs are met, I think we could create a more just, equitable, and humane world. People would be empowered to pursue their potential and live with basic dignity. Children could focus on learning and growth rather than mere survival.

Of course, eliminating poverty is an immense challenge that would require major systemic changes and global cooperation. But if I had the power to remake the world, I believe directing our collective efforts and ingenuity toward this goal would transform the human condition for the better more than anything else. A world without poverty, where everyone can live a decent life - that's the single biggest change I would want to see.
